title: Web Tester Spec
summary: Overall spec for GUI, graph editor, CSV, and AI features

title: Engine Architecture
summary: Engine design, data model, and API structure

title: Mermaid Preview
summary: Preview, zoom, and pan behavior for Mermaid diagrams

title: Design Improvements
summary: Legacy: UI color, readability, layout improvements (2025-11). Mostly implemented.

title: Spreadsheet Format
summary: CSV/TSV format and condition/effect column definitions

title: AI Features
summary: Non-AI deterministic paraphrase (synonym/style/seed) + AI provider (Mock/OpenAI). Batch AI and Ollama removed from scope (2026-03-07). GUI integration complete.

title: Graph Editor Phase 2
summary: SVG visual editor, drag and drop, and minimap

title: Technical Debt
summary: Post-split debt cleanup. Core debt resolved: E2E Vitest conflict, chunk optimization, graph visual issues, entity/inference, branch consolidation, doctor warnings, doc sync, model sync script, E2E batch stability. Remaining: CI integration, responsive/a11y, manual regression tests

title: Development Plan
summary: Single source for roadmap and progress

title: Variable System Extension
summary: Numeric variables, operations, comparisons, text expansion

title: Yarn Spinner Export
summary: Export spec for Yarn Spinner 2.x (.yarn)

title: Condition/Effect Refactor
summary: Shared module for evalCondition/applyEffect/cmp

title: Inference Engine
summary: Pluggable inference with forward/backward chaining and registry

title: Node Hierarchy System
summary: Tree view grouping, expansion state, and navigation

title: Search System
summary: 3-tier search: keyword + synonym + semantic (OpenAI)

title: XSS Protection
summary: Centralized HTML escaping and safe DOM manipulation

title: Inference UI Integration
summary: Inference engine visualization: path (UC-1), reachable nodes (UC-2), impact (UC-3), state keys (UC-4), What-if (UC-5). Phase 1-3 complete. Graph visual integration: path highlight (gold), unreachable dimming (0.4), impact coloring (coral), debug query UI.

title: Engine Core API
summary: Core engine API: model loading, session management, condition evaluation (8 types), effect application (7 types), inventory, validation

title: Model Schema
summary: Playthrough model JSON Schema. Strict oneOf + additionalProperties:false for all condition/effect types. EntityDef + PropertyDef + EventEntity schema. CharacterDef (KnowledgeProfile[]) + PropertyAwareLexicon (paraphraseLexicon) added. and/or/not composite conditions via $ref recursive definition. Structure + integrity validation (Ajv + assertModelIntegrity). 14 example models validated.

title: REST API (Backend)
summary: Express REST API: model CRUD, session management, AI integration. In-memory storage

title: Unity SDK
summary: Unity C# SDK (UPM): Engine API, InferenceRegistry (8 cond / 7 effect), Variables/Inventory. Serialize/test unverified

title: Paraphrase System
summary: Two-layer text paraphrase: local synonym dictionary (deterministic) + AI paraphrase (OpenAI/Mock)

title: Entity / Inventory System
summary: Entity definition and inventory management. TS/C# integrated. Web Tester: condition-effect-editor (hasItem/addItem/removeItem) + entity definition panel (CRUD, inline edit, collapsible). Schema updated.

title: Entity-Property System
summary: Extended EntityDef with PropertyDef hierarchy + inheritance. Engine: resolveProperty/getEntityProperties/getInheritanceChain. Schema: PropertyDef + parentEntity + property condition. Inference: propertyEvaluator (9 condition types). GUI: parentEntity dropdown, property CRUD. 19+1 tests.

title: Dynamic Text Engine
summary: Template expansion engine. [entity.property] refs via inheritance, {variable} expansion, {?condition:text} conditional sections (flag/resource/inventory). Web Tester integrated. 31 unit tests.

title: Paraphrase Property Matching
summary: Property-aware paraphrase selection. ConditionalVariant with match conditions, UsageHistory for repetition avoidance, buildParaphraseContext helper. Backward compatible with SP-PARA-001. 13 new tests.

title: Property Anomaly Detection
summary: Anomaly detection via property comparison. KnowledgeProfile (domain/accuracy/tolerance) × Entity property. detectAnomaly/detectAllAnomalies with deviation scoring. 13 unit tests.

title: Dynamic Event Entity Generation
summary: Dynamic event entity creation during gameplay. createEvent effect (with properties GUI) + hasEvent condition + template expansion. Anomaly-to-event bridge. Engine + schema + tests + GUI (condition-effect-editor with property key-value editor) complete.

title: Character Knowledge Model
summary: Character knowledge profiles for perception simulation. CharacterDef with KnowledgeProfile[], findKnowledgeProfile (domain fallback), perceiveEntity (anomaly detection bridge). 7 tests.

title: Description Tracker
summary: Entity description tracking for repetition avoidance. markDescribed/isDescribed/getUndescribedKeys/getDescriptionCount/resetDescriptions. Immutable DescriptionState. 14 tests.

title: Dynamic Story Expansion
summary: 3-layer responsibility separation. ConversationTemplate: trigger matching + priority + maxUses. eventMatch optional + sessionConditions (flag/resource/variable/hasItem) support. Schema + Web Tester integrated. Phase 4: GUI editor (template CRUD + trigger condition editing). 14 tests + 10 E2E.

title: Play Immersion MVP
summary: Web Tester play experience. Phase 1: paragraph fade-in, inline choices, crossfade/append-scroll transitions, TransitionRegistry, CSS animations, E2E 8 tests. Phase 2: scene image display (node presentation.image) + BGM (AudioManager, crossfade, autoplay policy). Manual confirmation pending.
